items.name: PET LIGER -  LOVE HEELS (Bubblegum)
items.description: The legendary LOVE HEELS, adored and shared across the world, arrive on Roblox for the first time ever in this stunning LIMITED EDITION Bubblegum colorway. These vibrant heels glow with soft, floating heart effects, giving your avatar a magical, romantic flair. Perfect for cute, elegant, or fantasy-inspired outfits, these heels make every step feel special.

items.name: Pumpkin Scarecrow Woodsguide Trouser (Part 3 of 5)
items.description:
These Woodsguide Trousers have so much style... Just look at those boots! 

You NEED this whimsical Pumpkin Scarecrow outfit in your inventory! A little scary but mostly magical, this costume will slay in all the top games this Halloween! The full look:
